heading: Authority to contribute to innovation fund
label: 2350s Authority to contribute to innovation fund
notes: References in TextThe date of the enactment of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2025, referred to in subsec. (a), is the date of enactment of , which was approved .Pub. L. 118–159Dec. 23, 2024

children.heading: .—Authority to Contribute to NATO Innovation Fund
children.label: a .—Authority to Contribute to NATO Innovation Fund
children.text: Within amounts authorized by law for such purpose during the five-year period following the date of the enactment of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2025, the Secretary of Defense may contribute to the NATO Innovation Fund a total amount of no more than $200,000,000.
The term “NATO” means the North Atlantic Treaty Organization.
The term “NATO Innovation Fund” means the multi-sovereign, investment venture capital fund of NATO that provides secure investment in dual-use, high-impact technology.
